1→// Flutter imports:
     2→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/controllers/session_list_controller.dart';
     3→import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
     4→
     5→// Package imports:
     6→import 'package:collection/collection.dart';
     7→import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';
     8→import 'package:gap/gap.dart';
     9→import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';
    10→import 'package:knowhere_configurable_camera/knowhere_configurable_camera.dart';
    11→
    12→// Project imports:
    13→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/controllers/resource_data_list_controller.dart';
    14→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/controllers/team_list_controller.dart';
    15→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/controllers/user_accessible_contents_controller.dart';
    16→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/data/models/failure/failure.dart';
    17→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/data/models/paging_data.dart';
    18→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/data/models/resource.dart';
    19→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/data/models/session.dart';
    20→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/data/result.dart';
    21→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/l10n/l10n_ext.dart';
    22→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/providers/profile_storage_provider.dart';
    23→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/utils/build_context_ext.dart';
    24→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/utils/dark_mode_ext.dart';
    25→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/utils/environment.dart';
    26→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/utils/platform.dart';
    27→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/components/custom_app_bar.dart';
    28→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/components/custom_dialog.dart';
    29→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/components/custom_loading_indicator.dart';
    30→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/components/empty_view.dart';
    31→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/components/paging_helper.dart';
    32→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/hooks/use_access_denied_navigation.dart';
    33→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/hooks/use_debounce.dart';
    34→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/pages/home/home_page.dart';
    35→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/pages/home/hooks/use_subscription.dart';
    36→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/pages/home/hooks/use_subscription_page.dart';
    37→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/pages/home/sessions/components/usage_limit_alert_snack_bar.dart';
    38→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/pages/home/sessions/session_details/ai_coach_report/ai_coach_report_container.dart';
    39→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/pages/home/sessions/session_details/components/resource_card.dart';
    40→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/pages/home/sessions/session_details/components/session_meta_data_menu_anchor.dart';
    41→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/pages/home/sessions/session_details/components/session_scatter_chart.dart';
    42→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/routers/app_router.dart';
    43→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/routers/home_router.dart';
    44→import 'package:baseball_detector_flutter/views/themes/color_manager.dart';
    45→
    46→/// A page widget class to display data of a session.
    47→/// It shows the list of the resources (i.e., videos and their analysis results) associated to the session.
    48→/// By tapping an analyzed resource item, its `ResourceDetailsPage` will open.
    49→/// Uploading local videos and re-analyzing failed videos also will be managed by this widget.
    50→class SessionDetailsPage extends HookConsumerWidget {
    51→  const SessionDetailsPage({
    52→    required this.session,
    53→    required this.teamId,
    54→    required this.sessionId,
    55→    super.key,
    56→  });
    57→
    58→  final String teamId;
    59→  final String sessionId;
    60→  final Session session;
    61→
    62→  @override
    63→  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    64→    final handleAccessDenied = useAccessDeniedNavigation();
    65→    final currentSession = useState<Session>(session);
    66→    final tabController = useTabController(initialLength: isDevOrTest ? 3 : 2);
    67→    final resourceState = ref.watch(
    68→      resourceDataListControllerProvider(
    69→        teamId: teamId,
    70→        sessionId: sessionId,
    71→      ),
    72→    );
    73→
    74→    return resourceState.when(
    75→      data: (resourceData) => _SessionDetailsPageContent(
    76→        resourcePagingData: resourceData,
    77→        currentSession: currentSession,
    78→        teamId: teamId,
    79→        tabController: tabController,
    80→        onSessionUpdated: (updatedSession) {
    81→          currentSession.value = updatedSession;
    82→        },
    83→      ),
    84→      loading: () => Scaffold(
    85→        appBar: CustomAppBar(isBackNavigation: true),
    86→        body: const CustomLoadingIndicator(),
    87→      ),
    88→      error: (error, stackTrace) {
    89→        if (error is ForbiddenFailure) {
    90→          handleAccessDenied();
    91→          return const SizedBox.shrink();
    92→        }
    93→
    94→        return Scaffold(
    95→          appBar: CustomAppBar(isBackNavigation: true),
    96→          floatingActionButton: FloatingActionButton(
    97→            backgroundColor: context.isDarkMode
    98→                ? ColorManager.darkSecondaryText
    99→                : ColorManager.secondaryText,
   100→            onPressed: null,
   101→            child: Icon(Icons.videocam_outlined),
   102→          ),
   103→          body: Center(
   104→            child: Column(
   105→              mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
   106→              children: [
   107→                IconButton(
   108→                  onPressed: () {
   109→                    ref
   110→                      ..invalidate(resourceDataListControllerProvider(
   111→                        teamId: teamId,
   112→                        sessionId: sessionId,
   113→                      ))
   114→                      ..invalidate(teamListControllerProvider);
   115→                  },
   116→                  icon: const Icon(Icons.refresh),
   117→                ),
   118→                Text(context.l10n.get_data_failed),
   119→                const Gap(8),
   120→                Text(
   121→                  (error is Failure)
   122→                      ? error.translate(context.l10n)
   123→                      : error.toString(),
   124→                  textAlign: TextAlign.center,
   125→                ),
   126→              ],
   127→            ),
   128→          ),
   129→        );
   130→      },
   131→    );
   132→  }
   133→}
   134→
   135→class _SessionDetailsPageContent extends HookConsumerWidget {
   136→  const _SessionDetailsPageContent({
   137→    required this.resourcePagingData,
   138→    required this.currentSession,
   139→    required this.teamId,
   140→    required this.tabController,
   141→    required this.onSessionUpdated,
   142→  });
   143→
   144→  final PagingData<ResourceData> resourcePagingData;
   145→  final ValueNotifier<Session> currentSession;
   146→  final String teamId;
   147→  final TabController tabController;
   148→  final void Function(Session) onSessionUpdated;
   149→
   150→  @override
   151→  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
   152→    final showSubscriptionPage = useSubscriptionPage();
   153→    final goToSubscription = useDebounce(showSubscriptionPage);
   154→    final accessibleContents =
   155→        ref.watch(userAccessibleContentsControllerProvider);
   156→    final userId = ref.watch(profileStorageProvider).getUserId();
   157→    final teamList = ref.watch(teamListControllerProvider);
   158→    final (canSubscribe, subscriptionStatus, restrictionMessage) =
   159→        useSubscription();
   160→    final isRecordingAvailable = teamList.fold(
   161→      loading: () => null,
   162→      error: (_) => null,
   163→      data: (teams) =>
   164→          currentSession.value
   165→              .isVideoUploadableByUser(userId!, accessibleContents!) &&
   166→          (teams
   167→                  .where((team) => team.id == teamId)
   168→                  .firstOrNull
   169→                  ?.teamPlanStatus
   170→                  .canAnalyze ??
   171→              false),
   172→    );
   173→
   174→    return Scaffold(
   175→      appBar: AppBar(
   176→        leading: IconButton(
   177→          tooltip: "Back",
   178→          icon: Icon(
   179→            isIos ? Icons.arrow_back_ios_new : Icons.arrow_back,
   180→            size: 20,
   181→          ),
   182→          onPressed: () {
   183→            Navigator.of(context).pop(true);
   184→          },
   185→        ),
   186→        title: SessionMetaDataMenuAnchor(session: currentSession.value),
   187→        actions: [
   188→          if (!currentSession.value
   189→              .isEditableByUser(userId!, accessibleContents!))
   190→            const SizedBox.shrink()
   191→          else
   192→            IconButton(
   193→              onPressed: () async {
   194→                final result = await Navigator.of(context).pushNamed(
   195→                  HomeRouter.editSessionPage,
   196→                  arguments: {'session': currentSession.value},
   197→                );
   198→                if (result is Session) {
   199→                  currentSession.value = result;
   200→                  onSessionUpdated(result);
   201→                }
   202→              },
   203→              icon: const Icon(Icons.settings),
   204→            ),
   205→        ],
   206→        bottom: PreferredSize(
   207→          preferredSize: Size.fromHeight(24),
   208→          child: Padding(
   209→            padding: HomePage.bodyPadding,
   210→            child: TabBar(
   211→              controller: tabController,
   212→              labelColor: ColorManager.main,
   213→              unselectedLabelColor: context.isDarkMode
   214→                  ? ColorManager.darkSecondaryText
   215→                  : ColorManager.secondaryText,
   216→              dividerColor: ColorManager.main,
   217→              tabs: [
   218→                Tab(
   219→                  height: 32,
   220→                  text: context.l10n.session_details_page__tab_list,
   221→                  iconMargin: EdgeInsets.zero,
   222→                ),
   223→                Tab(
   224→                  height: 32,
   225→                  text: context.l10n.session_details_page__tab_graph,
   226→                  iconMargin: EdgeInsets.zero,
   227→                ),
   228→                if (isDevOrTest)
   229→                  Tab(
   230→                    height: 32,
   231→                    text: context.l10n.session_details_page__tab_report,
   232→                    iconMargin: EdgeInsets.zero,
   233→                  ),
   234→              ],
   235→            ),
   236→          ),
   237→        ),
   238→      ),
   239→      body: SafeArea(
   240→        child: Padding(
   241→          padding: HomePage.bodyPadding.copyWith(top: 8),
   242→          child: Stack(
   243→            children: [
   244→              TabBarView(
   245→                controller: tabController,
   246→                children: [
   247→                  if (resourcePagingData.items.isEmpty)
   248→                    EmptyView(
   249→                      message: context.l10n.session_details_page__no_data,
   250→                    )
   251→                  else
   252→                    RefreshIndicator(
   253→                      onRefresh: () => onRefresh(ref),
   254→                      child: SizedBox(
   255→                        height: context.screenHeight,
   256→                        child: SingleChildScrollView(
   257→                          physics: const AlwaysScrollableScrollPhysics(),
   258→                          child: Column(
   259→                            children: [
   260→                              ...resourcePagingData.items.mapIndexed(
   261→                                (index, resource) => Container(
   262→                                  margin: const EdgeInsetsDirectional.only(
   263→                                    bottom: 8,
   264→                                  ),
   265→                                  child: ResourceCard(
   266→                                    teamId: teamId,
   267→                                    session: currentSession.value,
   268→                                    resource: resource,
   269→                                    isLastItem: index ==
   270→                                            resourcePagingData.items.length -
   271→                                                1 &&
   272→                                        index != 0,
   273→                                  ),
   274→                                ),
   275→                              ),
   276→                              if (resourcePagingData.hasMore)
   277→                                EndItemView(
   278→                                  visibilityKey: Key(
   279→                                    'EndItem_${resourcePagingData.items.length}',
   280→                                  ),
   281→                                  onScrollEnd: () {
   282→                                    ref
   283→                                        .read(
   284→                                            resourceDataListControllerProvider(
   285→                                          teamId: teamId,
   286→                                          sessionId: currentSession.value.id!,
   287→                                        ).notifier)
   288→                                        .loadNext();
   289→                                  },
   290→                                )
   291→                            ],
   292→                          ),
   293→                        ),
   294→                      ),
   295→                    ),
   296→                  SessionScatterChart(
   297→                    teamId: teamId,
   298→                    sessionId: currentSession.value.id!,
   299→                  ),
   300→                  if (isDevOrTest)
   301→                    RefreshIndicator(
   302→                      onRefresh: () => onRefresh(ref),
   303→                      child: AICoachReportContainer(
   304→                        teamId: teamId,
   305→                        sessionId: currentSession.value.id!,
   306→                        player: currentSession.value.player,
   307→                        report: currentSession.value.aiCoachReport,
   308→                        onSessionUpdated: onSessionUpdated,
   309→                      ),
   310→                    ),
   311→                ],
   312→              ),
   313→              Align(
   314→                alignment: Alignment.bottomCenter,
   315→                child: Padding(
   316→                  padding: context.isPortrait
   317→                      ? const EdgeInsets.only(right: 66, bottom: 10)
   318→                      : const EdgeInsets.only(right: 66, bottom: 32),
   319→                  child: const UsageLimitAlertSnackBar(),
   320→                ),
   321→              ),
   322→            ],
   323→          ),
   324→        ),
   325→      ),
   326→      floatingActionButton: ListenableBuilder(
   327→        listenable: tabController,
   328→        builder: (context, child) {
   329→          if (tabController.index == 0) {
   330→            return isRecordingAvailable == true
   331→                ? FloatingActionButton(
   332→                    backgroundColor: Theme.of(context)
   333→                        .floatingActionButtonTheme
   334→                        .backgroundColor,
   335→                    onPressed: () async {
   336→                      // Check if device is supported for camera recording
   337→                      try {
   338→                        final isSupported = await KnowhereConfigurableCamera
   339→                                .getSingletonObject()
   340→                            .isSupportedDevice();
   341→
   342→                        if (isSupported != true && context.mounted) {
   343→                          // Show warning dialog
   344→                          final shouldContinue = await showDialog<bool>(
   345→                            context: context,
   346→                            barrierDismissible: false,
   347→                            builder: (context) => CustomDialog.oneMessage(
   348→                              title: context.l10n
   349→                                  .session_details_page__device_unsupported_dialog_title,
   350→                              messageText: context.l10n
   351→                                  .session_details_page__device_unsupported_dialog_message,
   352→                              aboveButtonText: context.l10n
   353→                                  .session_details_page__device_unsupported_dialog_continue,
   354→                              belowButtonText: context.l10n
   355→                                  .session_details_page__device_unsupported_dialog_cancel,
   356→                              isAbovePositive: true,
   357→                              isBelowPositive: false,
   358→                              aboveButtonAction: (dialogContext) {
   359→                                Navigator.of(dialogContext).pop(true);
   360→                              },
   361→                              belowButtonAction: (dialogContext) {
   362→                                Navigator.of(dialogContext).pop(false);
   363→                              },
   364→                            ),
   365→                          );
   366→
   367→                          if (shouldContinue != true) {
   368→                            return;
   369→                          }
   370→                        }
   371→                      } catch (e) {
   372→                        debugPrint('Failed to check device support: $e');
   373→                      }
   374→
   375→                      if (!context.mounted) return;
   376→
   377→                      Navigator.of(context, rootNavigator: true).pushNamed(
   378→                        AppRouter.recordingPage,
   379→                        arguments: {
   380→                          'sessionId': currentSession.value.id!,
   381→                          'sessionCreatedAt':
   382→                              currentSession.value.createdAt ?? DateTime.now(),
   383→                          'teamId': teamId,
   384→                        },
   385→                      );
   386→                    },
   387→                    child: const Icon(Icons.videocam_outlined),
   388→                  )
   389→                : isRecordingAvailable == false && canSubscribe
   390→                    ? FloatingActionButton(
   391→                        backgroundColor: ColorManager.secondaryText,
   392→                        onPressed: () {
   393→                          if (canSubscribe) {
   394→                            final teams = teamList.valueOrNull;
   395→                            if (teams == null || teams.hasLeft) return;
   396→                            final team = teams.right
   397→                                .firstWhereOrNull((t) => t.id == teamId);
   398→                            goToSubscription.call(team);
   399→                          }
   400→                        },
   401→                        child: Icon(
   402→                          Icons.workspace_premium,
   403→                          color: Colors.yellow[700],
   404→                        ),
   405→                      )
   406→                    : FloatingActionButton(
   407→                        backgroundColor: ColorManager.secondaryText,
   408→                        onPressed: null,
   409→                        child: const Icon(Icons.videocam_outlined),
   410→                      );
   411→          }
   412→          return const SizedBox.shrink();
   413→        },
   414→      ),
   415→    );
   416→  }
   417→
   418→  Future<void> onRefresh(WidgetRef ref) async {
   419→    final res = await ref
   420→        .read(sessionListControllerProvider.notifier)
   421→        .refreshSpecificSesison(
   422→            teamId: teamId, sessionId: currentSession.value.id!);
   423→
   424→    if (res.hasRight) {
   425→      currentSession.value = res.right;
   426→    }
   427→
   428→    ref
   429→        .read(resourceDataListControllerProvider(
   430→          teamId: teamId,
   431→          sessionId: currentSession.value.id!,
   432→        ).notifier)
   433→        .forceRefresh();
   434→
   435→    ref.invalidate(teamListControllerProvider);
   436→
   437→    await ref.read(resourceDataListControllerProvider(
   438→      teamId: teamId,
   439→      sessionId: currentSession.value.id!,
   440→    ).future);
   441→  }
   442→}
   443→

     7→

content.text:
**バグはありません。**

差分を確認した結果、SessionDetailsPage に関する l10n（多言語対応）のキーが追加されており、すべて適切に定義されています：
- `session_details_page__tab_report` (AIレポート/AI Report)
- `session_details_page__device_unsupported_dialog_*` 系のダイアログメッセージ
- 既存の `session_details_page__tab_list`, `session_details_page__tab_graph`, `session_details_page__no_data` も定義済み

コードは正常に動作します。
